title: xyris elliottii
intro: Xyris elliottii, also known as Elliott's Yellow-eyed Grass, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Xyridaceae. The medicinal properties of Xyris elliottii are attributed to its essential oils, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, Xyris elliottii is prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, its essential oils are used in topical applications, such as creams and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
